top_stories.title: "OncoAgent: A Dual-Tier Multi-Agent Framework for Privacy-Preserving Oncology Clinical Decision Support"
top_stories.summary: Hugging Face Blog announced '"OncoAgent: A Dual-Tier Multi-Agent Framework for Privacy-Preserving Oncology Clinical Decision Support"', highlighting new developments relevant to AI researchers and practitioners.
top_stories.technical_takeaway: Trust, not model size, is becoming a core technical constraint in AI systems.
top_stories.primary_risk: Regulatory exposure and erosion of public trust due to opaque data practices.
top_stories.primary_opportunity: Differentiation through auditable, privacy-preserving AI pipelines.

top_stories.title: Fields Medalist says ChatGPT 5.5 Pro delivered "PhD-level" math research in under two hours with zero human help
top_stories.summary: Fields Medalist Timothy Gowers had ChatGPT 5.5 Pro tackle open problems in number theory. The model improved an exponential bound to a polynomial one in under an hour. An MIT researcher involved calls the key idea "completely original." Gowers' takeaway: the bar for mathematical contributions is now proving something LLMs can't. The article Fields
top_stories.technical_takeaway: Reinforces known techniques with modest refinements to existing methods.
top_stories.primary_risk: Unclear production readiness despite promising early results.
top_stories.primary_opportunity: Practical improvements when layered onto existing AI workflows.

top_stories.title: Broadcom reportedly won't build OpenAI's custom chip unless Microsoft buys 40 percent of them
top_stories.summary: OpenAI's custom AI chip project with Broadcom has hit a funding wall. Broadcom won't finance production unless Microsoft commits to buying 40 percent of the chips, and Microsoft hasn't agreed yet. OpenAI manager Sachin Katti called the dependency "financially unattractive" in an internal message. The first phase alone costs around 18 billion dollar
top_stories.technical_takeaway: Adds empirical validation to approaches already used in production AI stacks.
top_stories.primary_risk: Risk of overfitting conclusions to narrow benchmarks.
top_stories.primary_opportunity: Selective adoption in niche use cases with clear ROI.

top_stories.title: AI money keeps flowing as Deepseek plans record raise and Core Automation quadruples valuation in weeks
top_stories.summary: Deepseek is planning a funding round of up to $7.35 billion, the largest ever for a Chinese AI company. Deepseek V4.1 is set to launch in June. Meanwhile, Core Automation, founded by ex-OpenAI researcher Jerry Tworek just six weeks ago, is already targeting a $4 billion valuation.
